title: Bot window decoration: DWM border + CSS overlay
desc: Visual CDP bot feedback: colored DWM border (Win32 DWMWA_BORDER_COLOR) on Chrome window + injected CSS overlay div with tick-fade and streaming-pulse animations. Per-AI color coding: Claude=orange #ff781e, GPT=green #10A37F, Gemini=blue #4285F4.
steps: (B<<16); null → DWMWA_COLOR_DEFAULT=0xFFFFFFFF (Windows 11+ only, no-op on Win10)
SetBotOverlayAsync(show,hexColor): injects #__wkbot_overlay fixed div + CSS keyframes (fade 0.6s / pulse 0.9s infinite) + __wkBotTick / __wkBotStreaming JS fns on window
TickBotOverlay(): fire-and-forget EvalAsync('window.__wkBotTick?.()') on each CDP cmd — skips if !_overlayInjected
SetBotOverlayStreaming(bool): toggles .streaming class → infinite pulse while AI responding
Claude streaming: SetBotOverlayStreaming(true) on STREAMING detect, false on DONE/early-exit
author: claude
